findings.title: Duplicated spec.md and tasks.md validation across gate scripts
findings.suggested_fix: Extract the spec.md decision validation and tasks.md task-count validation into a shared helper script (e.g., scripts/lib/validate-gate-inputs.sh) and source it from check-gate-1.sh, check-gate-2-enter.sh, and check-gate-2-exit.sh.

evidence.value: check-gate-1.sh lines 26-46 and check-gate-2-enter.sh lines 48-68 contain identical spec.md validation logic (grep -q '## 锁定决策' + grep -cE '\| D-[0-9]{3}').
check-gate-1.sh lines 48-65 and check-gate-2-enter.sh lines 70-88 contain identical tasks.md validation logic (grep -cE '\| T-[0-9]{3}' with >8 threshold).

findings.title: Test scripts dynamically recreate static fixture files already in repo
findings.suggested_fix: Remove create_java_project_fixture() from test-code.sh and create_sample_feature() from test-feature.sh; point the tests directly at tests/fixtures/sample-java-project/ and tests/fixtures/sample-feature/.

evidence.value: test-code.sh defines create_java_project_fixture() which writes pom.xml, UserController.java, UserService.java, UserRepository.java, and User.java inline, even though identical files exist in tests/fixtures/sample-java-project/.
test-feature.sh defines create_sample_feature() which writes PRD.md, spec.md, and tasks.md inline, even though identical files exist in tests/fixtures/sample-feature/.

findings.title: Integration test boilerplate duplicated across four test files
findings.suggested_fix: Extract init_report, log_test, finalize_report, and cleanup into a shared test helper (e.g., tests/integration/common.sh) and source it from all four test scripts.

evidence.value: test-init.sh lines 76-142 define init_report, log_test, finalize_report, and cleanup.
test-feature.sh lines 86-152 define the same four functions with only trivial differences.
test-code.sh lines 69-135 define the same four functions with only trivial differences.
test-full-flow.sh lines 27-103 define the same four functions with only trivial differences.

findings.title: test-full-flow.sh only checks 2 of 4 SKILL.md files
findings.suggested_fix: Add 'skills/tech-code/SKILL.md' and 'skills/tech-commit/SKILL.md' to the skills array in test_skills_exist().

evidence.value: local skills=("skills/tech-init/SKILL.md" "skills/tech-feature/SKILL.md") — missing tech-code and tech-commit.

findings.title: Fragile compliance report fallback parsing with overly broad regex
findings.suggested_fix: Replace the fallback regex with a stricter pattern that anchors to the summary table row (e.g., grep the '总体结论' block or require YAML front-matter).

evidence.value: COMPLIANCE_BLOCK_RAW=$(grep -oE "BLOCK.*[0-9]+" ... | grep -oE "[0-9]+$" | head -1 || true) — this can match any line containing BLOCK followed by digits anywhere in the report, not just the summary counts.

findings.title: Pattern scan audit-field grep matches comments and strings, not just fields
findings.suggested_fix: Narrow the grep to field declarations by matching 'private.*createdAt' or similar patterns, or parse fields with a more structured approach (e.g., awk/sed on class bodies).

evidence.value: local created_at=$(grep -h "createdAt\|created_at\|createTime\|create_time" $entities 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ') — matches any occurrence including comments, strings, and method names.

residual_risks.title: Manual confirmation gates in check-gate-2-exit.sh may break in non-interactive CI environments
residual_risks.description: The script uses 'read -r -p' for compile confirmation, code-review confirmation, and verification confirmation. In non-interactive environments (CI, automated tests), these default to 'no' and will cause the gate to fail. Consider adding a --non-interactive or --assume-yes flag for automation.

testing_gaps.title: No test covers the shared gate validation helper once extracted
testing_gaps.description: If the duplicated validation logic is extracted into a shared helper, a dedicated unit test for that helper should be added to ensure edge cases (empty spec, zero decisions, exactly 8 tasks, >8 tasks) are covered.

testing_gaps.title: No negative test for pattern-scan.sh on non-Java projects
testing_gaps.description: The integration tests only verify pattern-scan.sh against Java projects. A test against a non-Java directory would verify graceful degradation and correct 'Unknown' stack detection.
